commands.review_summary:
The PR moves the POSIX npm script-shell helper into the shared npm project install env, updates focused tests, and adds a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection gives a high-confidence path: current main applies the absolute POSIX script shell only to global update envs, while managed plugin npm install/rollback/uninstall paths use the shared safe npm env without that setting.
